titleInfo.title: Hannya shingyō no sōgōteki kenkyū: Rekishi, shakai, shiryō
般若心經の綜合的研究：歴史·社会·資料
A Comprehensive Study of the Heart of Wisdom Sūtra: History, Society, and Materials

mods.abstract: On p. 27, this article is supposed to have informtion on the text that was carved in 672 on the stele that also preserved Huairen’s Heart Sutra assembed in Wang Xizhi’s calligraphy. Yes: Taizong wrote 『大唐三蔵聖教序 太宗は玄拡〈の訳経を記念して、『大唐三蔵聖教序』を撰した。戚亨三年（672, 12. Monat, 8. Tag) 『序』の他に般若心経等も刻しての石碑が弘福寺内に建った。実物は西安碑林に残っており、神文は次のようである。 Hongfu Monastery is where Xuanzang first engaged in translation from 645 until 648, when he moved to Da Ci’en Monastery.* See Fukui, Hannya Shingyo no Sogoteki Kenkyu l7, for the text of the carving related to the Heart Sutra. Also, Shunkei Iijima, ed., Shodo]iten [Great Encyclopedia of Calligraphy] (Tokyo: Tokyodo shuppan, 1995), 59.
